analysis.momentum: Neutral momentum with RSI at 52.97, but recent price action suggests a slight bearish bias
analysis.trade_plan: Consider buying on dips towards TV Pivot Support levels, but set tight stop-losses due to the neutral trend bias. Monitor price action for a potential breakout above TV Pivot Resistance levels. Be cautious of a potential reversal if price falls below TV Pivot Support.
